title: Sweet Chewy Maharashtrian Milk Chocolate Bars
description: A sweet and chewy Indian-inspired dessert featuring milk chocolate, perfect for a dairy-free friendly treat. This meal-prep friendly dish is broiled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Milk Chocolate Chips (dairy-free)
ingredients.notes: such as coconut milk or almond milk based

ingredients.name: Condensed Milk (dairy-free)
ingredients.notes: such as coconut milk or almond milk based

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the gram flour, sugar, cardamom powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, melt the ghee or vegan butter and condensed milk together.
Add the melted mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Fold in the milk chocolate chips and optional chopped pistachios and coconut flakes.
Press the mixture into a lined or greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
Broil for 5-7 minutes or until the top is lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
